title: Validating Complex JSON Schema
scenario: Generate a JSON schema validation function that validates a complex JSON object containing arrays, nested objects, and schema definitions. The function should be able to handle schema references, conditional validation, and recursive validation.
constraints: Must use a specific JSON schema validation library
Must handle schema references and conditional validation

evaluationCriteria.description: The code is syntactically correct and uses proper JavaScript syntax.
The code adheres to the specified constraints, including the use of a specific JSON schema validation library and handling of schema references and conditional validation.
The function correctly validates the complex JSON object against the schema and handles recursive validation.
